# datarobot_user_mcp_resource_metadata (Resource)

User MCP resource metadata. This resource creates a resource metadata entry for a given MCP server version using the User MCP public API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "datarobot_user_mcp_resource_metadata" "example" {
  name                  = "resource name"
  type                  = "userResce"
  mcp_server_version_id = "69a761e40746897942318e2f"
  uri                   = "uri://example_uri"
}


output "example_id" {
  value       = datarobot_user_mcp_resource_metadata.example.id
  description = "The id for the user mcp resource metadata resource"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mcp_server_version_id` (String) The ID of the MCP server version this resource belongs to.
- `name` (String) The name of the MCP resource.
- `type` (String) The type of the MCP resource.
- `uri` (String) The URI of the MCP resource.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the MCP resource is created.
- `id` (String) The ID of the User MCP resource metadata.
- `user_id` (String) The id of the user who created the MCP resource.
- `user_name` (String) The name of the user who created the MCP resource
